description: Shared correctness fixtures (docs/benchmark-correctness-fixtures.md). The Java kernel and the Rust AOT baseline generate the identical input stream (xorshift64, seed 7, 1024 amounts of 1 + state % 1000, unsigned) and must produce exactly these totals — the semantic-equivalence oracle for every JIT experiment and for the separate-scenario AOT baseline. Change a value here only together with both test suites.
